13.reason: The format string "%d " includes a trailing space, which may cause input reading issues; should be "%d"

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.25 , reason:  The space after %d causes scanf to consume extra whitespace, which may skip the next operation. Use "%d" instead.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.25 , reason:  [The space after %d in scanf can cause input parsing issues by consuming extra whitespace or waiting for more input, leading to incorrect reads. It should be "%d" without trailing space.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.25 , reason:  [The space after %d in scanf may consume the next operation token, causing misalignment in input parsing. Also, the overflow check happens after reading input and before pushing, but the push still occurs even when full.]
